招待状、なんてものが届いたからな。: I got an invitation letter, you know.
娼館からの招待状。<br>どこか怪しくも挑発的な誘いに乗って、今夜ここを訪れたの:
An invitation letter from the brothel. I accepted its suspicious yet
provocative offer and came here tonight.
今日のお相手はとても強敵よ。<br>たっぷりと楽しんでいってね。:
Today's partner is quite a formidable opponent. Enjoy yourself to the
fullest.
強敵、というのは誰のことなのか。<br>疑問に思いながらも、負けるつもりはないと:
Who could this 'formidable opponent' be? With that question in mind,
I headed to the room, determined not to lose.
